quiet: The black is quiet today. The hull ticks as it warms in a distant sun.
Someone left the galley radio on an old frontier station. Nobody turns it off.
You catch yourself talking to the ship again. She doesn't answer. Probably for the best.
A Union news relay drones about tariffs. You change the channel.
The stars don't care about your fuel gauge. Somehow that's comforting.
You find an old coin from Meridian under the pilot seat. Heads. Good omen.
rumors: "Foundry's yard runs 15% off list price. Bring your own welder though."
"Food's nearly free on Kestrel's Rest. Buy there, sell to the Verge — folk out there eat money."
"Medicine bought cheap on Meridian sells triple out past the frontier."
"Pirates work the long empty runs. Weapons bay ain't optional forever, captain."
"Union patrols scan for smuggler holds. A good bribe is cheaper than a fine."
"Hire a mechanic before you need one. Ships break in the middle of nowhere, that's the rule."
"The Syndicate pays well and remembers favors. The Union pays on time and remembers everything."
"A stateroom pays for itself in two VIP charters, if you can stomach the clientele."
"Eleven years this month since Meridian. They still call it a reactor accident at the memorial. Nobody who was there calls it anything."
"Verge Station's had bad radio nights for weeks now. Fuel broker says it's sunspots. Fuel broker says a lot of things."
"My grandmother swore Elysium was real — a moon past the charts where the Meridian dead all washed up alive. Spacer's tale. Probably."
"Some captains hear things out past the Verge lanes that don't sound like anything. Four seconds, they say. Then it's gone."
"There's a woman in a grey coat been through every cantina on this route asking after captains with a name. Ask me, she's trouble worth having."

dmgFlavor.fueltank: Fuel sprays into the void before the feed lines seal.
dmgFlavor.cargohold: Decompression in the hold — cargo netting snaps like thread.
dmgFlavor.cabin: The passenger cabin vents atmosphere; everyone crowds into the corridor.
dmgFlavor.quarters: The crew bunks are scrap metal and floating bedding.
dmgFlavor.hydro: The hydroponics bay is a blizzard of frozen bean plants.
dmgFlavor.medbay: The auto-doc sparks, dispenses one final bandage, and dies.
dmgFlavor.weapons: The weapons bay capacitors blow in a shower of sparks.
dmgFlavor.shields: The shield emitters overload and go dark.
dmgFlavor.armory: The armory rack tears loose. There are rifles in the vents now.
dmgFlavor.workshop: Half the workshop's tools are orbiting debris.
dmgFlavor.smuggler: The hidden hold's false floor buckles. It is neither hidden nor a floor.
dmgFlavor.luxcabin: The stateroom's chandelier is — was — very expensive.
dmgFlavor.reactor: The auxiliary reactor SCRAMs hard. Emergency lighting only.

depart: The dock clamps release with a clang you feel in your teeth.
The drive lights and the whole ship leans into it, eager.
Ground control mutters something about unpaid berth fees. You're already gone.
Behind you, the port shrinks to a bright pinprick, then nothing.
